meaning: v.扫,打扫,清扫,席卷,冲光,扫过,掠过
examples: Wintry weather continues to sweep across Colorado.
The rescue helicopter made another sweep over the bay.
Strong winds regularly sweep the islands.
Marteinn Hjaltested is a huge man with a sweep of red-blond hair and an outdoor complexion.
You blithely sweep off the cover and set to it with a silver spoon.
